query: Show me your Morgan Digital CFO job description and the autonomous key tasks you follow.
Run your autonomous CFO workday checks and summarize what you completed today.
Give me the end-of-day CFO breakdown with completed work, blocked work, and tomorrow priorities.
Check this month budget vs actuals and flag any material anomalies.
List your configured sub-agents and explain when you would call Cassidy, Avatar, or AI Kanban.

Show how Morgan maps to every major CorpGen paper mechanism, including MHTE/MOMA, hierarchical planning, isolated sub-agents, tiered memory, adaptive summarization, cognitive tools, experiential learning, emergent collaboration, and artifact evaluation.
Open your paper match matrix and explain which CorpGen capabilities are implemented now versus which require enterprise production hardening.
Explain how you prevent the four Multi-Horizon Task Environment failure modes: context saturation, memory interference, dependency complexity, and reprioritization overhead.
Generate your CFO operating plan, list the next runnable autonomous tasks, and explain what proof you require before delivery.
Show your enterprise readiness checks for Agent 365 SDK, MCP tooling, observability, Purview audit posture, avatar presence, sub-agents, durable memory, and scheduler safety.
Summarize your adaptive memory and experiential learning playbook before starting a new autonomous CFO workday.

Evaluate this CFO briefing artifact for evidence, actionability, governance, and executive readiness: Revenue is below plan and marketing spend is high. Next action is to brief the CFO and request approval before sending the update.
Combine WorkIQ, Foundry IQ, and Fabric IQ into an executive CFO update, and clearly label which data is deterministic demo data versus production integration path.
Use Fabric IQ to explain this month's financial figures, pipeline coverage, retention, headcount cost, and support cost signals.
Use Foundry IQ to explain whether Morgan's CFO briefing is grounded, evaluated, and ready to present.
